description: You are an EHS manager processing chemical waste. Research Acetone (CAS 67-64-1), Acetic Acid, Glacial (CAS 64-19-7), Thionyl Chloride (CAS 7719-09-7), Hydrochloric Acid (CAS 7647-01-0), and Ethylene Glycol (CAS 107-21-1) on CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each chemical, identify the Flash Point (°F), Corrosivity, and Water Reactivity. Apply RCRA waste code rules: D001 (Ignitable) for Flash Point < 140°F, D002 (Corrosive) for chemicals explicitly listed as 'Corrosive', and D003 (Reactive) for those listed as 'Water Reactive' or 'Reacts violently with water'. Create a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/waste_classification.csv with columns: 'Chemical Name', 'Flash Point (F)', 'Corrosive?', 'Water Reactive?', and 'RCRA Codes' (separated by semicolons or 'None').
